file.content:
# MMS Development Docker Compose
#
# Starts all MMS services for local development.
#
# Usage:
#   docker compose up -d                   # Start all services
#   docker compose up -d postgres redis    # Start data services only
#   docker compose logs -f backend         # View backend logs
#   docker compose down -v                 # Stop and remove volumes
#
# Environment:
#   Copy .env.example to .env and configure as needed
#
# Services:
#   - postgres: PostgreSQL 16 + TimescaleDB
#   - redis: Redis 7 for queues and caching
#   - backend: MMS API server (Bun + Hono)
#   - worker: MMS background workers (BullMQ)
#   - frontend: React development server (Vite)
#   - file-watcher: Mileage CSV file watcher
#   - optimizer: C++ OR-Tools optimizer binary
#
# @see specs/008-operations.md

name: mms-dev

services:
  # =============================================================================
  # Data Layer
  # =============================================================================

  postgres:
    image: timescale/timescaledb:2.14.2-pg16
    container_name: mms-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${POSTGRES_PORT:-5432}:5432"
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-mms}
      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-mms}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-mms_dev_password}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./drizzle/manual:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d:ro
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-mms} -d ${POSTGRES_DB:-mms}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 10s
    networks:
      - mms-network

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: mms-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${REDIS_PORT:-6379}:6379"
    command: >
      redis-server
      --appendonly yes
      --maxmemory 256mb
      --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 5s
    networks:
      - mms-network

  # =============================================================================
  # Application Layer
  # =============================================================================

  backend:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile.backend
    container_name: mms-backend
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${API_PORT:-3000}:3000"
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: development
      PORT: 3000
      HOST: 0.0.0.0
      DATABASE_URL: postgres://${POSTGRES_USER:-mms}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-mms_dev_password}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-mms}
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-dev_jwt_secret_change_in_production}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-debug}
      OTEL_ENABLED: ${OTEL_ENABLED:-false}
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "-q", "--spider", "http://localhost:3000/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s
    networks:
      - mms-network
    develop:
      watch:
        - action: sync+restart
          path: ./src
          target: /app/src

  worker:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile.worker
    container_name: mms-worker
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: development
      DATABASE_URL: postgres://${POSTGRES_USER:-mms}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-mms_dev_password}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-mms}
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
      REDIS_HOST: redis
      REDIS_PORT: 6379
      OPTIMIZER_BINARY_PATH: /opt/optimizer/mms-optimizer
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-debug}
      WORKERS: ${WORKERS:-}
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
      optimizer:
        condition: service_started
    volumes:
      - optimizer_binary:/opt/optimizer:ro
    networks:
      - mms-network
    develop:
      watch:
        - action: sync+restart
          path: ./src
          target: /app/src

  frontend:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile.frontend
      target: development
    container_name: mms-frontend
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${FRONTEND_PORT:-5173}:5173"
    environment:
      VITE_API_URL: http://localhost:${API_PORT:-3000}
    volumes:
      - ./src:/app/src:ro
      - ./public:/app/public:ro
    networks:
      - mms-network

  file-watcher:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile.file-watcher
    container_name: mms-file-watcher
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: development
      DATABASE_URL: postgres://${POSTGRES_USER:-mms}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-mms_dev_password}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-mms}
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
      WATCH_PATH: /data/inbox
      QUARANTINE_PATH: /data/quarantine
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-debug}
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    volumes:
      - file_inbox:/data/inbox
      - file_quarantine:/data/quarantine
    networks:
      - mms-network

  # =============================================================================
  # Optimizer Sidecar (C++ Binary)
  # =============================================================================

  optimizer:
    build:
      context: ./mms-optimizer
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: mms-optimizer
    # The optimizer binary is spawned by the worker process
    # This container just makes the binary available
    entrypoint: ["/bin/sh", "-c"]
    command: ["cp /app/mms-optimizer /opt/optimizer/ && tail -f /dev/null"]
    volumes:
      - optimizer_binary:/opt/optimizer
    networks:
      - mms-network

  # =============================================================================
  # Development Utilities
  # =============================================================================

  # Redis Commander - Web UI for Redis
  redis-commander:
    image: rediscommander/redis-commander:latest
    container_name: mms-redis-commander
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${REDIS_COMMANDER_PORT:-8081}:8081"
    environment:
      REDIS_HOSTS: local:redis:6379
    depends_on:
      - redis
    networks:
      - mms-network
    profiles:
      - tools

  # pgAdmin - Web UI for PostgreSQL
  pgadmin:
    image: dpage/pgadmin4:latest
    container_name: mms-pgadmin
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "${PGADMIN_PORT:-8082}:80"
    environment:
      PGADMIN_DEFAULT_EMAIL: ${PGADMIN_EMAIL:-admin@mms.local}
      PGADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD: ${PGADMIN_PASSWORD:-admin}
      PGADMIN_CONFIG_SERVER_MODE: "False"
    volumes:
      - pgadmin_data:/var/lib/pgadmin
    depends_on:
      - postgres
    networks:
      - mms-network
    profiles:
      - tools

# =============================================================================
# Networks
# =============================================================================

networks:
  mms-network:
    driver: bridge

# =============================================================================
# Volumes
# =============================================================================

volumes:
  postgres_data:
    driver: local
  redis_data:
    driver: local
  optimizer_binary:
    driver: local
  file_inbox:
    driver: local
  file_quarantine:
    driver: local
  pgadmin_data:
    driver: local

content.content:
1тЖТ/**
     2тЖТ * MMS Prometheus Metrics
     3тЖТ *
     4тЖТ * Application metrics for monitoring and alerting.
     5тЖТ * Exposed via /metrics endpoint for Prometheus scraping.
     6тЖТ *
     7тЖТ * Metric types:
     8тЖТ * - Counter: Monotonically increasing values (requests, errors)
     9тЖТ * - Gauge: Point-in-time values (active jobs, queue depth)
    10тЖТ * - Histogram: Distribution of values (request duration, solve time)
    11тЖТ *
    12тЖТ * @see specs/004-backend-specification.md Section 4.14
    13тЖТ */
    14тЖТ
    15тЖТimport { Registry, Counter, Gauge, Histogram, collectDefaultMetrics } from 'prom-client';
    16тЖТ
    17тЖТ// =============================================================================
    18тЖТ// Registry Setup
    19тЖТ// =============================================================================
    20тЖТ
    21тЖТexport const registry = new Registry();
    22тЖТ
    23тЖТ// Add default Node.js metrics (CPU, memory, event loop, etc.)
    24тЖТcollectDefaultMetrics({
    25тЖТ  register: registry,
    26тЖТ  prefix: 'mms_',
    27тЖТ});
    28тЖТ
    29тЖТ// =============================================================================
    30тЖТ// HTTP Metrics
    31тЖТ// =============================================================================
    32тЖТ
    33тЖТexport const httpRequestsTotal = new Counter({
    34тЖТ  name: 'mms_http_requests_total',
    35тЖТ  help: 'Total number of HTTP requests',
    36тЖТ  labelNames: ['method', 'path', 'status'] as const,
    37тЖТ  registers: [registry],
    38тЖТ});
    39тЖТ
    40тЖТexport const httpRequestDuration = new Histogram({
    41тЖТ  name: 'mms_http_request_duration_seconds',
    42тЖТ  help: 'HTTP request duration in seconds',
    43тЖТ  labelNames: ['method', 'path', 'status'] as const,
    44тЖТ  buckets: [0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 1, 2.5, 5, 10],
    45тЖТ  registers: [registry],
    46тЖТ});
    47тЖТ
    48тЖТexport const httpRequestsInFlight = new Gauge({
    49тЖТ  name: 'mms_http_requests_in_flight',
    50тЖТ  help: 'Number of HTTP requests currently being processed',
    51тЖТ  labelNames: ['method'] as const,
    52тЖТ  registers: [registry],
    53тЖТ});
    54тЖТ
    55тЖТ// =============================================================================
    56тЖТ// PM Scheduling Metrics
    57тЖТ// =============================================================================
    58тЖТ
    59тЖТexport const pmScheduledTotal = new Counter({
    60тЖТ  name: 'mms_pm_scheduled_total',
    61тЖТ  help: 'Total number of PM events scheduled',
    62тЖТ  labelNames: ['pm_code', 'fleet_id', 'status'] as const,
    63тЖТ  registers: [registry],
    64тЖТ});
    65тЖТ
    66тЖТexport const pmComplianceWindowDays = new Histogram({
    67тЖТ  name: 'mms_pm_compliance_window_days',
    68тЖТ  help: 'Days between PM scheduling and compliance window end',
    69тЖТ  labelNames: ['pm_code'] as const,
    70тЖТ  buckets: [-14, -7, 0, 7, 14, 30, 60, 90],
    71тЖТ  registers: [registry],
    72тЖТ});
    73тЖТ
    74тЖТexport const pmDeferredTotal = new Counter({
    75тЖТ  name: 'mms_pm_deferred_total',
    76тЖТ  help: 'Total number of PM events deferred',
    77тЖТ  labelNames: ['pm_code', 'reason'] as const,
    78тЖТ  registers: [registry],
    79тЖТ});
    80тЖТ
    81тЖТ// =============================================================================
    82тЖТ// Optimizer Metrics
    83тЖТ// =============================================================================
    84тЖТ
    85тЖТexport const optimizerSolveSeconds = new Histogram({
    86тЖТ  name: 'mms_optimizer_solve_seconds',
    87тЖТ  help: 'Optimizer solve time in seconds',
    88тЖТ  labelNames: ['solver_type', 'status'] as const,
    89тЖТ  buckets: [0.1, 0.5, 1, 5, 10, 30, 60, 120],
    90тЖТ  registers: [registry],

   329тЖТ
   330тЖТ/**
   331тЖТ * HTTP middleware helper - measure request duration
   332тЖТ */
   333тЖТexport function measureHttpRequest(
   334тЖТ  method: string,
   335тЖТ  path: string,
   336тЖТ  status: number,
   337тЖТ  durationMs: number
   338тЖТ): void {
   339тЖТ  const labels = { method, path, status: String(status) };
   340тЖТ  httpRequestsTotal.inc(labels);
   341тЖТ  httpRequestDuration.observe(labels, durationMs / 1000);
   342тЖТ}
   343тЖТ
   344тЖТ/**
   345тЖТ * Queue job helper - record job completion
   346тЖТ */
   347тЖТexport function recordQueueJob(
   348тЖТ  queue: string,
   349тЖТ  jobName: string,
   350тЖТ  status: 'completed' | 'failed',
   351тЖТ  durationMs: number
   352тЖТ): void {
   353тЖТ  queueJobsTotal.inc({ queue, status });
   354тЖТ  queueJobDuration.observe({ queue, job_name: jobName }, durationMs / 1000);
   355тЖТ}
   356тЖТ
   357тЖТ/**
   358тЖТ * Optimizer helper - record solve completion
   359тЖТ */
   360тЖТexport function recordOptimizerRun(
   361тЖТ  solverType: 'cpsat' | 'fallback',
   362тЖТ  status: 'optimal' | 'feasible' | 'infeasible' | 'timeout' | 'error',
   363тЖТ  durationMs: number,
   364тЖТ  objective?: number
   365тЖТ): void {
   366тЖТ  optimizerRunsTotal.inc({ solver_type: solverType, status });
   367тЖТ  optimizerSolveSeconds.observe({ solver_type: solverType, status }, durationMs / 1000);
   368тЖТ  if (objective !== undefined) {
   369тЖТ    optimizerObjectiveValue.set({ solver_type: solverType }, objective);
   370тЖТ  }
   371тЖТ}

   606тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   607тЖТ  }),
   608тЖТ
   609тЖТ  // Circuit breaker metrics
   610тЖТ  circuitBreakerState: new Gauge({
   611тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_circuit_breaker_state',
   612тЖТ    help: 'Circuit breaker state (0=closed, 1=open, 2=half-open)',
   613тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   614тЖТ  }),
   615тЖТ  circuitBreakerTrips: new Counter({
   616тЖТ    name: 'mms_maximo_circuit_breaker_trips_total',
   617тЖТ    help: 'Total number of circuit breaker trips',
   618тЖТ    registers: [registry],

   622тЖТ  conflictsDetected: new Counter({

   625тЖТ    registers: [registry],

   638тЖТ    registers: [registry],

   640тЖТ  shadowRecordsConflict: new Gauge({

   643тЖТ    registers: [registry],

   647тЖТ    help: 'Number of shadow records in error state',
   648тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   649тЖТ  }),
   650тЖТ};
   651тЖТ
   652тЖТ/**
   653тЖТ * Record Maximo sync operation
   654тЖТ */
   655тЖТexport function recordMaximoSync(
   656тЖТ  operation: 'push' | 'pull' | 'full' | 'polling',
   657тЖТ  status: 'success' | 'failure' | 'partial',
   658тЖТ  durationMs: number,
   659тЖТ  recordsProcessed: number,
   660тЖТ  recordsUpdated: number
   661тЖТ): void {
   662тЖТ  maximoMetrics.syncRequestsTotal.inc({ operation, status });
   663тЖТ  maximoMetrics.syncDuration.observe({ operation }, durationMs / 1000);
   664тЖТ  maximoMetrics.syncRecordsProcessed.inc({ operation, result: 'processed' }, recordsProcessed);
   665тЖТ  maximoMetrics.syncRecordsProcessed.inc({ operation, result: 'updated' }, recordsUpdated);
   666тЖТ}
   667тЖТ
   668тЖТ/**
   669тЖТ * Record webhook received
   670тЖТ */
   671тЖТexport function recordMaximoWebhook(
   672тЖТ  eventType: string,
   673тЖТ  status: 'success' | 'failure',
   674тЖТ  durationMs: number,
   675тЖТ  depotId?: string
   676тЖТ): void {
   677тЖТ  maximoMetrics.webhooksReceived.inc({ event_type: eventType, status });
   678тЖТ  maximoMetrics.webhookProcessingDuration.observe({ event_type: eventType }, durationMs / 1000);
   679тЖТ  if (status === 'success') {
   680тЖТ    maximoMetrics.webhookLastReceivedAt.set({ depot_id: depotId ?? 'global' }, Date.now() / 1000);
   681тЖТ  }
   682тЖТ}
   683тЖТ
   684тЖТ/**
   685тЖТ * Record polling fallback activation
   686тЖТ */
   687тЖТexport function recordPollingFallbackActivation(reason: 'webhook_timeout' | 'manual' | 'circuit_breaker'): void {
   688тЖТ  maximoMetrics.pollingTriggered.inc({ trigger_reason: reason });
   689тЖТ}
   690тЖТ
   691тЖТ/**
   692тЖТ * Update sync mode metric
   693тЖТ */
   694тЖТexport function updateSyncModeMetric(depotId: string, mode: 'WEBHOOK' | 'POLLING' | 'HYBRID'): void {
   695тЖТ  const modeValue = mode === 'WEBHOOK' ? 0 : mode === 'POLLING' ? 1 : 2;
   696тЖТ  maximoMetrics.syncMode.set({ depot_id: depotId }, modeValue);
   697тЖТ  maximoMetrics.pollingFallbackActive.set({ depot_id: depotId }, mode !== 'WEBHOOK' ? 1 : 0);
   698тЖТ}
   699тЖТ
   700тЖТ// =============================================================================
   701тЖТ// Rate Limiting Metrics
   702тЖТ// =============================================================================
   703тЖТ
   704тЖТ/**
   705тЖТ * Rate limiting metrics for monitoring and alerting
   706тЖТ *
   707тЖТ * @see specs/005-api.md - Rate Limiting: 100 requests/minute per user
   708тЖТ */
   709тЖТexport const rateLimitMetrics = {
   710тЖТ  /**
   711тЖТ   * Total rate limit checks performed
   712тЖТ   */
   713тЖТ  rateLimitChecks: new Counter({
   714тЖТ    name: 'mms_rate_limit_checks_total',
   715тЖТ    help: 'Total number of rate limit checks performed',
   716тЖТ    labelNames: ['identifier_type', 'result'] as const,
   717тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   718тЖТ  }),
   719тЖТ
   720тЖТ  /**
   721тЖТ   * Rate limit exceeded events
   722тЖТ   */
   723тЖТ  rateLimitExceeded: new Counter({
   724тЖТ    name: 'mms_rate_limit_exceeded_total',
   725тЖТ    help: 'Total number of requests rejected due to rate limiting',
   726тЖТ    labelNames: ['identifier_type'] as const,
   727тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   728тЖТ  }),
   729тЖТ
   730тЖТ  /**
   731тЖТ   * Current rate limit window usage per identifier
   732тЖТ   */
   733тЖТ  rateLimitUsage: new Gauge({
   734тЖТ    name: 'mms_rate_limit_usage',
   735тЖТ    help: 'Current rate limit usage percentage',
   736тЖТ    labelNames: ['identifier_type'] as const,
   737тЖТ    registers: [registry],
   738тЖТ  }),
   739тЖТ};
   740тЖТ
   741тЖТ/**
   742тЖТ * Record rate limit check result
   743тЖТ */
   744тЖТexport function recordRateLimitCheck(
   745тЖТ  identifierType: 'user' | 'ip',
   746тЖТ  result: 'allowed' | 'exceeded'
   747тЖТ): void {
   748тЖТ  rateLimitMetrics.rateLimitChecks.inc({ identifier_type: identifierType, result });
   749тЖТ  if (result === 'exceeded') {
   750тЖТ    rateLimitMetrics.rateLimitExceeded.inc({ identifier_type: identifierType });
   751тЖТ  }
   752тЖТ}

# MMS File Watcher Service
# Watches for new mileage CSV files and queues them for processing
#
# Build:
#   docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.file-watcher -t mms-file-watcher .
#
# Run:
#   docker run -v /path/to/inbox:/data/inbox -v /path/to/quarantine:/data/quarantine \
#     -e DATABASE_URL=... -e REDIS_URL=... mms-file-watcher
#
# Environment Variables:
#   WATCH_PATH - Directory to watch (default: /data/inbox)
#   QUARANTINE_PATH - Failed files directory (default: /data/quarantine)
#   POLL_INTERVAL_MS - Polling interval (default: 1000)
#   FILE_PATTERN - File pattern regex (default: mileage_\\d{8}\\.csv)
#
# Size target: <150MB
# @see specs/008-operations.md Section 8.2.2

# =============================================================================
# Stage 1: Dependencies
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS dependencies

WORKDIR /app

# Copy dependency files
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./

# Install production dependencies only
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile --production

# =============================================================================
# Stage 2: Builder
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /app

# Copy package files and install all dependencies
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy source code
COPY tsconfig.json ./
COPY src ./src

# Type check
RUN bun run typecheck

# =============================================================================
# Stage 3: Production
# =============================================================================
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS production

WORKDIR /app

# Add non-root user for security
RUN addgroup -S mms && adduser -S mms -G mms

# Copy production dependencies
COPY --from=dependencies /app/node_modules ./node_modules

# Copy application code
COPY --from=builder /app/package.json ./
COPY --from=builder /app/src ./src

# Create data directories
RUN mkdir -p /data/inbox /data/quarantine && \
    chown -R mms:mms /data

# Set ownership
RUN chown -R mms:mms /app

# Switch to non-root user
USER mms

# Environment
ENV NODE_ENV=production
ENV WATCH_PATH=/data/inbox
ENV QUARANTINE_PATH=/data/quarantine
ENV POLL_INTERVAL_MS=1000
ENV STABILITY_THRESHOLD_MS=2000

# No port exposed - file watcher doesn't serve HTTP

# Health check via process existence
HEALTHCHECK --interval=60s --timeout=10s --start-period=10s --retries=3 \
  CMD pgrep -f "bun run src/file-watcher/daemon.ts" || exit 1

# Start file watcher daemon
CMD ["bun", "run", "src/file-watcher/daemon.ts"]

## Detailed Gap Analysis: Spec 007 (Integration) & Spec 008 (Operations)

### IMPLEMENTATION STATUS SUMMARY

**Spec 007 - Integration (Requirements: 7 core areas)**
- **Maximo REST Client**: тЬЕ IMPLEMENTED
- **Shadow Record Pattern**: тЬЕ IMPLEMENTED  
- **Status-Based Edit Locking**: тЬЕ IMPLEMENTED
- **Circuit Breaker Pattern**: тЬЕ IMPLEMENTED
- **Retry Logic with Exponential Backoff**: тЬЕ IMPLEMENTED
- **Webhook Handlers**: тЬЕ IMPLEMENTED
- **Health Check Endpoints**: тЪая╕П PARTIAL (polling fallback added)

**Spec 008 - Operations (Requirements: 7 core areas)**
- **Docker Configuration Files**: тЬЕ IMPLEMENTED
- **Kubernetes Manifests**: тЭМ NOT FOUND
- **Prometheus Metrics Configuration**: тЬЕ IMPLEMENTED
- **Grafana Dashboards**: тЭМ NOT IMPLEMENTED (metrics infrastructure only)
- **Alert Rules**: тЭМ NOT IMPLEMENTED (missing prometheus-alerts.yaml)
- **CI/CD Pipeline Configuration**: тЭМ NOT FOUND (.github/workflows missing)
- **Database Migration Strategy**: тЬЕ IMPLEMENTED (drizzle-kit based)

---

### DETAILED FINDINGS

#### SPEC 007: INTEGRATION REQUIREMENTS

**COMPLETED (тЬЕ)**

1. **Maximo REST Client Implementation** (`src/services/maximo-client.ts`)
   - Full HTTP client with OSLC REST API endpoints
   - Work order CRUD operations
   - Query support for modified work orders
   - Connection testing and timeout handling
   - Simulation mode for testing without Maximo

2. **Shadow Record Pattern** (`src/lib/db/schema/maximo-integration.ts`)
   - Database schema for shadow records
   - Tracks PM тЖТ Maximo WO relationship
   - Stores both MMS and Maximo data snapshots
   - Sync status tracking (PENDING, SYNCED, CONFLICT, ERROR)
   - Last sync timestamp and error tracking

3. **Status-Based Edit Locking** (`src/api/routes/integration.ts`)
   - `POST /integration/validate-edit` endpoint (lines 1173-1270)
   - Checks for locked Maximo statuses (INPRG, COMP, CLOSE, CAN)
   - Returns 423 Locked status code for in-progress work
   - Prevents race conditions per spec 7.4.6

4. **Circuit Breaker Pattern** (`src/lib/utils/resilience.ts`)
   - Full `CircuitBreaker` class implementation (lines 327-499)
   - States: CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN
   - Configurable failure/success thresholds
   - Reset timeout with automatic recovery
   - Metrics tracking (state changes, total requests)
   - Integration with OpenTelemetry tracing

5. **Retry Logic with Exponential Backoff** (`src/lib/utils/resilience.ts`)
   - `withRetry()` function with exponential backoff (lines 178-251)
   - Configurable retry configs: DEFAULT, AGGRESSIVE, QUICK, EXTERNAL_SERVICE
   - Jitter to prevent thundering herd
   - Retryable error predicate for filtering
   - OpenTelemetry event recording for each attempt

6. **Webhook Handlers** (`src/api/routes/integration.ts`)
   - `POST /integration/webhooks/maximo` endpoint (lines 195-422)
   - Event types: wo_status_changed, wo_created, wo_updated, wo_cancelled
   - Payload validation (lines 109-176)
   - Shadow record linking by WO number or mms_schedule_id
   - Status mapping and PM locking logic

7. **Health Check Endpoints** (`src/api/routes/integration.ts`)
   - `GET /integration/polling/health` (lines 1286-1307) - webhook health status
   - `GET /integration/polling/stats` (lines 1318-1348) - detailed polling statistics
   - `POST /integration/polling/check` (lines 1555-1581) - manual health check

**PARTIALLY COMPLETED (тЪая╕П)**

1. **Polling Fallback Implementation**
   - File exists: `src/services/maximo-polling.ts`
   - Webhook timeout detection with configurable grace period
   - Fallback to polling when webhooks unavailable
   - Deduplication window to prevent duplicates
   - Manual activation/deactivation endpoints

**NOT FOUND (тЭМ)**

1. **Email Notification System** (Spec 7.6)
   - Database schema exists: `src/lib/db/schema/notifications.ts`
   - Service exists: `src/services/notification.ts`
   - Worker exists: `src/workers/processors/notification.ts`
   - **Missing**: SMTP configuration implementation, template system
   - **Status**: Domain model exists but integration incomplete

2. **OCC Integration** (Spec 7.5)
   - No files found for run assignment export or mileage feedback
   - **Status**: Not started

3. **Report Generation** (Spec 7.7)
   - No implementation found
   - **Status**: Not started

---

#### SPEC 008: OPERATIONS REQUIREMENTS

**COMPLETED (тЬЕ)**

1. **Docker Configuration Files**
   - `docker/Dockerfile.backend` (2104 bytes) - Multi-stage Bun build
   - `docker/Dockerfile.frontend` (3148 bytes) - Nginx-based React app
   - `docker/Dockerfile.worker` (2582 bytes) - BullMQ worker
   - `docker/Dockerfile.file-watcher` (2662 bytes) - File ingestion daemon
   - All include: non-root users, health checks, proper layering
   - `docker-compose.yml` (272 lines) - Complete development stack

2. **Prometheus Metrics Configuration** (`src/lib/metrics/index.ts`)
   - Registry setup with default Node.js metrics
   - **HTTP Metrics**: requests_total, request_duration_seconds, requests_in_flight
   - **PM Scheduling Metrics**: scheduled_total, compliance_window_days, deferred_total
   - **Optimizer Metrics**: solve_seconds, runs_total, objective_value, fallbacks_total
   - **Fleet Metrics**: mileage_km, train_status, available_trains
   - **Drift Metrics**: trains_requiring_replan, mileage_percent, analysis_total
   - **Queue Metrics**: jobs_total, job_duration, depth
   - **Ingestion Metrics**: files_total, rows_total, anomalies_total
   - **Notification Metrics**: queued, sent, digested
   - **Database Metrics**: query_duration, connection_pool_size, errors_total
   - **Maximo Integration Metrics** (lines 519-650):
     - Sync operations, webhooks, polling fallback, circuit breaker, conflicts
     - Shadow records by status (pending, conflict, error)
     - Duplicate prevention tracking
   - **Rate Limiting Metrics**: checks, exceeded, usage

3. **Database Migration Strategy** (`drizzle.config.ts`)
   - Uses `drizzle-kit` for schema generation
   - Commands: `bun run drizzle-kit generate:pg`, `push:pg`, `migrate`
   - Production migration locking via `pg_advisory_lock`
   - Rolling restart of backends after schema changes

4. **PostgreSQL Configuration** (Spec 8.4.1)
   - Parameters documented in spec (shared_buffers, max_connections, etc.)
   - Environment-based configuration in docker-compose

**NOT FOUND (тЭМ)**

1. **Kubernetes Manifests** (`k8s/` directory)
   - **Missing**:
     - Deployment manifests for backend, workers, frontend
     - Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) configuration
     - Service and Ingress definitions
     - ConfigMaps and Secrets management
     - NetworkPolicies for security
     - Pod Security Policies
     - StatefulSets for PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO
     - PersistentVolumeClaims
   - **Impact**: Cannot deploy to production without these

2. **Grafana Dashboards** (Spec 8.5.2)
   - No JSON dashboard definitions found
   - Spec shows example "MMS Overview" dashboard structure
   - **Missing**: Dashboard provisioning configuration

3. **Alert Rules** (Spec 8.5.3)
   - No `prometheus-alerts.yaml` found
   - Spec defines 8 alert rules:
     - HighErrorRate (5m, >5% error rate)
     - OptimizerSlow (10m, 95th percentile >60s)
     - DriftThresholdExceeded (1h, >10 trains)
     - MileageFileNotReceived (30m, >2 hours)
     - DatabaseConnectionPoolExhausted (5m, >90% usage)
     - (Plus 3 more for customer success indicators)
   - **Impact**: Cannot set up production alerting

4. **CI/CD Pipeline Configuration** (`.github/workflows/`)
   - Directory not found
   - Spec defines `.github/workflows/main.yml` with:
     - Test job (lint, typecheck, unit tests, coverage)
     - Build job (Docker build and push)
     - Deploy-staging job (develop branch)
     - Deploy-production job (main branch with canary)
   - **Impact**: Cannot automate deployments

---

### GAP ANALYSIS BY DOMAIN

#### ЁЯФ┤ CRITICAL GAPS (Blocking Production)

| Requirement | Status | Impact | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| Kubernetes Manifests | тЭМ Missing | Cannot deploy to production | HIGH |
| Prometheus Alert Rules | тЭМ Missing | No production alerts/SLOs | MEDIUM |
| CI/CD Pipelines | тЭМ Missing | No automated deployments | HIGH |
| Grafana Dashboards | тЭМ Missing | No production observability UI | MEDIUM |
| SMTP/Email Notifications | тЪая╕П Partial | Notifications incomplete | MEDIUM |

#### ЁЯЯб IMPORTANT GAPS (Needed for Phase 2+)

| Requirement | Status | Impact | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| OCC Integration | тЭМ Missing | Cannot export run assignments | HIGH |
| Report Generation | тЭМ Missing | Cannot generate PDF/Excel reports | HIGH |
